name: Greek Potato Salad with Dried Tomatoes
recipeIngredient: 1 lb (3 medium) potatoes, uniform in size, cut into 1/4-inch slices
1 cup dried tomato halves (1.5 ounces), halved with kitchen shears
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-quart saucepan over medium heat, cook potatoes, covered, in 2 inches boiling water until tender, about 12 minutes; drain and set aside.
2. Meanwhile, in a small bowl, cover tomatoes with boiling water; set aside for 10 minutes while you prepare the dressing.
3. Thoroughly drain tomatoes and pat dry with paper towels.
4. Add potatoes, tomatoes, and cucumbers to a bowl containing the dressing; toss to coat.
5. Mound the potato mixture on a plate. Arrange onion, cheese, and olives on top.
Note: The nutritional information provided is an estimate based on the ingredients listed.
